title: Acadia Pharmaceuticals Reports Q2 2025 Earnings and Raises Full-Year Guidance
text: Acadia Pharmaceuticals Inc. today reported financial results for the second quarter ended June 30, 2025. Total revenues for Q2 2025 were $264.6 million, an increase of 9% compared to Q2 2024. NUPLAZID (pimavanserin) net product sales were $168.5 million, up 7% year-over-year. DAYBUE (trofinetide) net product sales were $96.1 million, up 14% year-over-year. Net income for Q2 2025 was $40.2 million, or $0.16 per diluted share. Operating cash flow for the six months ended June 30, 2025, was $142.3 million. The company also announced enrollment completion in the Phase III COMPASS PWS study of ACP-101 for Prader-Willi Syndrome (PWS), with top-line results expected in Q4 2025. Full-year 2025 revenue guidance was raised to $1.045-$1.095 billion from $1.030-$1.095 billion.
